no_baseline_warning: No vanilla baseline: changes are shown without "before → after" and rows appear in full.
tools_missing: Missing binaries in tools/: %1. See tools/VERSIONS.md.
home_subtitle: Add mods (.pak, .zip or folder). Order sets the default priority: the first one wins.
home_dropzone: Drag a .pak / .zip / folder here, or use the buttons
home_import_baseline_tip: Folder with vanilla table JSONs (UAssetGUI/FModel dump)
changes_hint: Load mods and run "Analyze changes" on the Mods page.
conflicts_none: No conflicts between the loaded mods. 🎉
merge_output_note: Output: zzz_StellarTool_Merged_P (the zzz prefix guarantees load priority)
merge_nobaseline_note: No baseline: tables start from the highest-priority mod and selections are applied on top.
merge_zip_check: Also generate an installable .zip (Paks\ + readme, for Vortex or another mod manager)
settings_game_desc: Needed to read Zen/IoStore mods and build the vanilla baseline. Auto-detected from Steam if possible.
settings_game_none: Not set — Zen mods can't be read.
err_game_not_found: That folder doesn't look like a Stellar Blade install (SB/Content/Paks/global.utoc not found).
lang_popup_desc: You can change it later in Settings.
easy_subtitle: Drop all your mods here and merge everything against vanilla in one click. Conflicts are auto-resolved by order (the first mod wins).
easy_advanced_hint: Untick any change you don't want in the merge. Conflicts are resolved in favor of the first mod; use the Conflicts tab to change a winner.
easy_setup_banner: Stellar Blade folder not set: Zen mods (the usual Nexus format) can't be read and changes are shown without vanilla values.
mode_advanced_tip: Workbench for building a merge-mod: mod priority, per-change selection, manual conflict resolution, projects.
conflicts_hint: Load mods and analyze to see conflicts here.
err_cue4_missing: cue4parse.exe not found in tools/. Run setup.bat. Needed to read Zen/IoStore mods.
err_need_game_path: To read Zen/IoStore mods, set your Stellar Blade folder in Settings (CUE4Parse needs the game's global container to resolve types).
err_zen_mod: '%1' is a Zen/IoStore mod (.ucas/.utoc) and could not be reverted to legacy (already-packed mod containers cannot always be unpacked). Use the legacy version of the mod: a classic .pak, or the folder with the .uasset files (e.g. the 'package' dir with SB/Content/...).
err_zen_mod_tables:
'%1' is a Zen/IoStore mod (.ucas/.utoc) that cannot be reverted to legacy, so its values can't be read for merging.

It modifies: %2.

To merge it, get the mod's legacy version (a classic .pak, or its source folder with the .uasset files under SB/Content/...).
err_zen_container: '%1' is a Zen/IoStore container that could not be reverted to legacy. Use the legacy version of the mod.
err_zip_empty: The zip contains neither .pak nor .uasset assets.
err_unsupported: Unsupported format: %1 (.pak, .zip or folder are accepted)
merge_ok_zip: OK: merged pak + installable zip generated and verified in %1.
merge_ok: OK: merged pak generated and verified in %1.
merge_skipped_note: (%1 non-numeric changes from Zen mods —text/enums/arrays/objects— were skipped: only numeric values round-trip reliably to a Zen container.)
